about.title: About Us | AI Design Hub 2.0
about.description: Learn about AI Design Hub - the comprehensive directory of AI-powered design tools helping designers, developers, and creators discover the best AI tools.
about.heading: About AI Design Hub
about.mission_p1: AI Design Hub is on a mission to empower designers, developers, and creators by providing the most comprehensive and curated directory of AI-powered design tools. We believe that artificial intelligence is revolutionizing the creative industry, and everyone should have easy access to the best tools available.
about.mission_p2: Our platform serves as a central hub where you can discover, compare, and choose the perfect AI tools for your creative projects — from image generation and video creation to UI/UX design, 3D modeling, animation, and productivity enhancement.
about.what_we_do_p: We curate and categorize the best AI design tools from around the web, providing detailed information, ratings, and reviews to help you make informed decisions. Our directory includes:
about.tool_image_desc: AI-powered tools for creating stunning visuals, artwork, and designs
about.tool_video_desc: AI video generators, editors, and enhancement tools
about.tool_uiux_desc: AI-assisted interface design and user experience optimization tools
about.tool_3d_desc: AI-powered 3D asset creation and modeling tools
about.tool_animation_desc: AI animation generators and motion design tools
about.tool_productivity_desc: AI tools to enhance workflow and creative productivity
about.quality_desc: Every tool in our directory is carefully reviewed and verified to ensure quality and reliability.
about.updates_desc: Our database is continuously updated with the latest AI tools and innovations in the industry.
about.community_desc: User reviews and ratings help you make informed decisions based on real experiences.
about.free_desc: Our directory is completely free for users. We believe in democratizing access to AI design tools.
about.team_p: AI Design Hub was founded by a passionate team of designers, developers, and AI enthusiasts who saw the need for a centralized platform to discover AI design tools. Our diverse team brings together expertise in:
about.team_remote: We're a remote-first team spread across the globe, united by our passion for design and technology.
about.contact_p: Have questions, suggestions, or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you! Visit our
about.contact_p2: to get in touch with our team.

contact.title: Contact Us | AI Design Hub 2.0
contact.description: Get in touch with the AI Design Hub team. We'd love to hear from you.
contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions, suggestions, or want to get in touch? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.form_note: Note: This is a demo form. In production, this form will send your message directly to our team.
contact.email_time: We typically respond within 24-48 hours during business days.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions | AI Design Hub 2.0
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about AI Design Hub, AI design tools, and how to use our directory.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.still_p1: Can't find what you're looking for? We're here to help!
faq.q1_a: AI Design Hub is a comprehensive directory of AI-powered design tools. We curate and review the best AI tools for designers, developers, and creators to help you find the perfect tool for your creative projects.
faq.q2_q: How are tools selected and reviewed?
faq.q2_a: Every tool in our directory goes through a careful review process. Our team evaluates each tool based on features, ease of use, pricing, and user feedback. We only include tools that meet our quality standards.
faq.q3_q: Are all the tools free to use?
faq.q3_a: No, different tools have different pricing models. Each tool listing clearly shows its pricing type: Free, Freemium, Free Trial, or Paid. You can use our filters to find tools that match your budget.
faq.q4_q: How often is the directory updated?
faq.q4_a: We update our directory weekly with new tools and innovations. We also regularly review and update existing tool listings to ensure the information is accurate and up-to-date.
faq.q5_q: Can I submit a tool to be listed?
faq.q5_a: Absolutely! We welcome tool submissions from developers and companies. Visit our Submit Tool page to submit your AI design tool for review. Our team will review your submission and get back to you within 2-3 business days.
faq.q6_q: How do I choose the right AI design tool?
faq.q6_a: Consider your specific needs: What type of design work do you do? What's your budget? Do you need integrations with other tools? Read our detailed tool reviews, compare features, and check user ratings to make an informed decision.
faq.q7_a: Yes! You can compare up to 3 AI design tools side by side on our Compare page. This helps you evaluate different options based on features, pricing, pros/cons, and user reviews.
faq.q8_q: How can I support AI Design Hub?
faq.q8_a: You can support us by: 1) Sharing our website with others, 2) Following us on social media, 3) Subscribing to our newsletter, 4) Providing feedback on tools you've used, and 5) Considering our advertising options if you're a tool developer.
faq.q9_q: Is my data safe when I create an account?
faq.q9_a: Yes, we take data security seriously. We use secure authentication via Supabase, and we never share your personal information with third parties without your consent. Read our Privacy Policy for more details.
faq.q10_q: How do I reset my password?
faq.q10_a: Click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your email address, and we'll send you a password reset link. Follow the instructions in the email to set a new password.
faq.q11_q: Can I save tools for later?
faq.q11_a: Yes! You can favorite tools by clicking the heart icon on any tool card or tool detail page. Your favorited tools are saved to your account and can be accessed from the Favorites page when you're logged in.
faq.q12_q: How do I contact the AI Design Hub team?
faq.q12_a: You can reach us through our Contact page, email us at hello@aidesignhub.com, or message us on social media. We typically respond within 24-48 hours during business days.

advertise.title: Advertise With Us | AI Design Hub 2.0
advertise.description: Advertise your AI design tool to thousands of designers, developers, and creators on AI Design Hub.
advertise.heading: Advertise With Us
advertise.subtitle: Reach thousands of designers, developers, and creators actively looking for AI design tools.
advertise.option1_desc: Get your tool featured at the top of relevant category pages and search results. Sponsored listings include a 'Sponsored' badge and are shown to users actively looking for tools like yours.
advertise.option2_desc: Prominently display your tool on our homepage, in our newsletter, and in our weekly 'Featured Tool' section. Maximum visibility for your brand.
advertise.option3_desc: Reach our subscriber base directly through dedicated newsletter spots, sponsored sections in our weekly digest, or custom email campaigns.
advertise.option4_desc: Display banner ads on high-traffic pages across our site. Multiple size options available: leaderboard (728x90), rectangle (300x250), and sidebar (160x600).
advertise.pricing_note: Pricing varies based on placement, duration, and traffic. Contact our team for a customized quote tailored to your marketing goals and budget.
advertise.get_started_p: Ready to promote your AI design tool to our engaged audience? Contact our advertising team today to discuss options and get a personalized quote.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | AI Design Hub 2.0
privacy.description: Privacy Policy for AI Design Hub. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how AI Design Hub ('we', 'us', or 'our') collects, uses, and discloses your personal information when you visit our website aidesignhub.com (the 'Site'). By using the Site, you consent to the practices described in this policy.
privacy.s1_p1: We collect information you provide directly when you:
privacy.s1_li1: Create an account or user profile
privacy.s1_li3: Contact us via email or contact form
privacy.s1_li5: Leave reviews or comments on tools
privacy.s1_p2: This information may include: name, email address, username, profile information, and any content you submit.
privacy.s1_p3: We also automatically collect certain information when you visit our Site, including: IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, time spent on pages, and referring website addresses. This information is collected using cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.s2_li1: Provide, maintain, and improve our Site and services
privacy.s2_li2: Process tool submissions and respond to inquiries
privacy.s2_li3: Send newsletters and marketing communications (with your consent)
privacy.s2_li4: Analyze Site usage to understand user preferences and improve user experience
privacy.s2_li5: Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and security incidents
privacy.s3_p: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:
privacy.s3_li1: With service providers who assist us in operating the Site (e.g., hosting, analytics, email services)
privacy.s3_li2: When required by law or to comply with legal processes
privacy.s3_li3: To protect our rights, property, or safety, or that of our users or the public
privacy.s3_li4: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
privacy.s4_p: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our Site and store certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Site.
privacy.s5_p: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s6_p: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information:
privacy.s6_li1: Access and review your personal information
privacy.s6_li4: Object to or restrict processing of your information
privacy.s6_p2: To exercise these rights, please contact us at hello@aidesignhub.com.
privacy.s7_p: Our Site is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we will take steps to delete such information.
privacy.s8_p: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Effective Date'. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
privacy.s9_p: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at hello@aidesignhub.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service | AI Design Hub 2.0
terms.description: Terms of Service for AI Design Hub. Read our terms and conditions for using our website and services.
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ('Terms') govern your access to and use of the AI Design Hub website ('Site') and services. By accessing or using our Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of these Terms, you may not access the Site.
terms.s1_p: AI Design Hub provides a directory of AI-powered design tools, including tool reviews, ratings, comparisons, and related content. Our directory includes both free and paid tools, and we may receive compensation from tool providers for featured listings or advertising.
terms.s2_p: When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information. You are responsible for safeguarding your account password and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.s3_p: You agree not to use the Site to:
terms.s3_li1: Violate any applicable law or regulation
terms.s3_li2: Infringe the rights of any third party
terms.s3_li3: Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent information
terms.s3_li4: Post or transmit any harmful, offensive, or inappropriate content
terms.s3_li5: Interfere with or disrupt the operation of the Site
terms.s3_li6: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Site
terms.s4_p: By submitting a tool to our directory, you represent and warrant that: (a) you have the right to submit the tool; (b) the tool information is accurate; and (c) the tool does not violate any applicable laws or third-party rights. We reserve the right to reject or remove any tool submission at our sole discretion.
terms.s5_p: The content on our Site, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is owned by AI Design Hub or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not use, reproduce, or distribute any content from our Site without our prior written consent.
terms.s6_p: Our Site and services are provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We disclaim all warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not warrant that our Site will be uninterrupted or error-free.
terms.s7_p: In no event shall AI Design Hub be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses resulting from: (a) your use or inability to use our Site; (b) any unauthorized access to or use of our servers; (c) any interruption or cessation of transmission to or from our Site; or (d) any bugs, viruses, or similar that may be transmitted to or through our Site.
terms.s8_p: Our Site may contain links to third-party websites or list third-party AI tools. We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites or tools. You acknowledge and agree that we shall not be responsible for any damage or loss caused by or in connection with the use of any such content, goods, or services.
terms.s9_p: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless AI Design Hub and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, or debt, and expenses (including attorney's fees) arising from: (a) your use of and access to the Site; (b) your violation of any term of these Terms; or (c) your violation of any third-party right.
terms.s10_p: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to our Site immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever, including but not limited to a breach of these Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using our Site.
terms.s11_p: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights.
terms.s12_p: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. By continuing to access or use our Site after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use the Site.
terms.s13_p: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at hello@aidesignhub.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy | AI Design Hub 2.0
cookies.description: Cookie Policy for AI Design Hub. Learn about how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website.
cookies.heading: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how AI Design Hub ('we', 'us', or 'our') uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our website aidesignhub.com (the 'Site'). By using the Site, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy.
cookies.s1_p: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the owners of the site. Cookies can be 'persistent' or 'session' cookies. Persistent cookies remain on your device after you close your browser, while session cookies are deleted as soon as you close your browser.
cookies.s2_p: We use the following types of cookies:
cookies.s2_essential: Essential Cookies: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. You may not opt out of these cookies.
cookies.s2_analytics: Analytics Cookies: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. We use this information to improve our website and your experience.
cookies.s2_functional: Functional Cookies: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization, such as remembering your preferences (e.g., language, theme). They may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages.
cookies.s2_targeting: Targeting/Advertising Cookies: These cookies are used to deliver advertisements more relevant to you and your interests. They are also used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement and help measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.
cookies.s3_p: We may also allow third-party service providers to use cookies on our Site to collect information about your online activities over time and across different websites. These third parties include analytics providers (e.g., Google Analytics) and advertising partners.
cookies.s4_p: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings preferences. You can typically:
cookies.s4_p2: Please note that if you choose to block or delete cookies, some features of our Site may not function properly.
cookies.s5_p: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Cookie Policy on this page and updating the 'Effective Date'. You are advised to review this Cookie Policy periodically for any changes.
cookies.s6_p: If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy, please contact us at hello@aidesignhub.com.

api.title: API Documentation | AI Design Hub 2.0
api.description: API documentation for AI Design Hub. Learn about our planned API endpoints and how to integrate with our platform.
api.heading: API Documentation
api.intro: Our API is currently under active development. We plan to provide programmatic access to our AI design tool directory, allowing developers to integrate our data into their own applications. This page will be updated as we make progress.
api.overview_p: The AI Design Hub API will provide RESTful access to our database of AI design tools. You'll be able to search for tools, retrieve detailed tool information, access user reviews, and more. The API will return data in JSON format.
api.endpoint1: GET /api/v1/tools - List all tools (with pagination, filtering, and sorting)
api.endpoint2: GET /api/v1/tools/{slug} - Get detailed information about a specific tool
api.endpoint4: GET /api/v1/tools/{slug}/reviews - Get reviews for a specific tool
api.auth_p: API authentication will likely use API keys or OAuth 2.0. Details will be announced when the API is closer to release.
api.rate_limit_p: We plan to implement rate limiting to ensure fair usage. Specific limits will be announced before the API launch.
api.stay_updated_p: Want to be notified when our API launches? Subscribe to our newsletter or follow us on social media for updates.
